# Role Responsibility Template

Use this template when adding or updating roles in docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md to keep entries consistent.

- Role Name: (e.g., UX Designer)
- Role Summary: (one sentence)
- Responsibilities:
  - [ ] Primary responsibility 1
  - [ ] Primary responsibility 2
  - [ ] Supporting responsibility 3
- Goals / Success Signals:
  - Metric / outcome 1
  - Metric / outcome 2
- Typical Communication Patterns:
  - Who they communicate with and when (e.g., Daily standups, sprint planning, weekly sync)
- When to involve:
  - Key milestones and decision points where this role must be included
- Interactions with existing roles:
  - Short bullet list of handoffs, dependencies, and escalation paths
- Acceptance Criteria for the role content (checks for doc maintainers):
  - [ ] Aligns with project management overview
  - [ ] Clear owners for common activities
  - [ ] Provides at least one measurable goal
